input.prompt:

input.initialPrompt:
I'm migrating from Xamarin.Forms to .NET MAUI. My existing code uses
ListView with ViewCell for each item. Should I keep using ListView in
MAUI? Also, can I reuse my ViewCell templates inside CollectionView?

data.content:
**ListView vs CollectionView in .NET MAUI:**

No — prefer **CollectionView** over ListView in MAUI. CollectionView is more performant, uses platform-native virtualization, and doesn't require wrapping items in a `ViewCell`.

**Can you reuse ViewCell inside CollectionView?**

No. `CollectionView` does not use `ViewCell` — it uses a `DataTemplate` directly containing your layout (e.g., a `Grid` or `StackLayout`). You'll need to extract the *content* of your `ViewCell` into a plain `DataTemplate`.

**Migration example:**

```xml
<!-- Xamarin.Forms ListView -->
<ListView ItemsSource="{Binding Items}">
  <ListView.ItemTemplate>
    <DataTemplate>
      <ViewCell>
        <StackLayout>
          <Label Text="{Binding Name}" />
        </StackLayout>
      </ViewCell>
    </DataTemplate>
  </ListView.ItemTemplate>
</ListView>

<!-- .NET MAUI CollectionView -->
<CollectionView ItemsSource="{Binding Items}">
  <CollectionView.ItemTemplate>
    <DataTemplate>
      <StackLayout>
        <Label Text="{Binding Name}" />
      </StackLayout>
    </DataTemplate>
  </CollectionView.ItemTemplate>
</CollectionView>
```

**Key differences:**
| | ListView | CollectionView |
|---|---|---|
| Requires ViewCell | Yes | No |
| Built-in selection | Single | Single + Multi |
| Grouping | Yes | Yes |
| Pull-to-refresh | Built-in | Via `RefreshView` wrapper |
| Performance | Good | Better (no ViewCell overhead) |

**TL;DR:** Strip the `<ViewCell>` wrapper, move its child directly into the `DataTemplate`, and switch to `CollectionView`.
